reason: This is a general religious/philosophical reflection about accountability to God through angels recording deeds. It does not contain any extremist ideology or ISIS-specific content.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: لو أستبدلنا مقولة -للجدران آذان- بمقولة -للملائكة أقلام- لخرج منا جيل لا يخشى إلا ذنبه ولا يرجوا إلا ربه . !
